title: INTENSIVE COMMUNITY TREATMENT SERVICES - 211info
text: TRILLIUM FAMILY SERVICES INTENSIVE COMMUNITY TREATMENT SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides psychiatric residential treatment and outpatient therapy. Services include psychiatric assessment, medication management, individual, family, and/or group therapy and skills training. Services offered on campus or in the community with 24/7 crisis response for families. 3415 SE Powell Boulevard Portland, OR 97202 Eligibility: Ages 5-17 Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm, crisis services 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (503) 813-7760 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 234-9591 Main phone Main phone (503) 813-7760 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Must be referred by family care coordinator, wraparound coordinator, or other OHP representative if the potential client has OHP. Call or visit website for more information FEES: Accepts OHP and most private insurances DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Portland Metro Area Services: Adolescent/Youth Counseling Child Guidance Mental Health Evaluation * Adolescents Mental Health Evaluation * Children Psychiatric Medication Services Social Skills Training Other Services Offered At This Location: MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - MENTAL HEALTH PROMOTION PROGRAM MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - PSYCHIATRIC DAY TREATMENT MENTAL HEALTH CARE FACILITIES - PSYCHIATRIC RESIDENTIAL MENTAL HEALTH CARE FACILITIES - SUBACUTE MENTAL HEALTH SUPPORT SERVICES - YOUNG ADULT PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. TRILLIUM FAMILY SERVICES
